title: Judy Faulkner
text:
PROFILE

# Judy Faulkner

Founder & CEO, Epic Systems

$7.8B

### Real Time Net Worth

as of 4/22/26

Reflects change since 5 pm ET of prior trading day.

[\ in the world today](https://www.forbes.com/real-time-billionaires/)

   

Photo by Courtesy Judy Faulkner

From the Editor

## Last Updated Mar 10, 2026, 1:01am EDT

* Judy Faulkner founded medical-record software provider Epic Systems in a Wisconsin basement in 1979.
* Faulkner, a computer programmer, is CEO of the $5.7 billion (2024 sales) company, of which she owns an estimated 43%.
* Epic supports the medical records of over 250 million patients and is used by top medical centers such as Johns Hopkins and Mayo Clinic.
* The company has never raised venture capital or made an acquisition, and develops all its software in-house.
* Faulkner signed the Giving Pledge in 2015 and has agreed to eventually give 99% of her assets to a private charitable foundation.
* In 2024 she told Forbes that she was regularly selling around $100 million of her Epic shares a year back to the company, with proceeds going to her charitable foundation, Roots & Wings.

Did you know

Faulkner started Epic, originally named Human Services Computing, with $70,000; she wrote the original code on a Data General Eclipse 16-bit minicomputer.

Perks at her Epic's headquarters in Verona, Wisconsin include a tree house and an Indiana Jones-inspired cave walkway.

In Their Own Words

> "I always liked making things out of clay. And the computer was clay of the mind. Instead of physical, it was mental."
> 
> Judy Faulkner

[### 2025 Forbes Healthcare Summit | Decoding Tomorrow: Epic's Blueprint For Healthcare Intelligence](https://www.forbes.com/video/73085ee1-3093-47e3-b1cb-891ac3a620b2/)

Judy Faulkner founded Epic 45 years ago in the basement of an apartment house with $70,000 in start-up money and turned it into a multi-billion dollar business---ultimately building the digital foundation of modern medicine. We’ll speak with Judy about her illustrious career and her vision for how Epic’s “healthcare intelligence” will drive the long-term direction of digital patient care.
Forbes Executive Editor Luisa Kroll sits down with Epic Founder & CEO Judy Faulkner at the 2025 Forbes Healthcare Summit in New York City.

By [Nicolet Hartmann](https://www.forbes.com/sites/nicolethartmann/) Forbes Staff

[](https://www.facebook.com/dialog/feed?app_id=123694841080850&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F73085ee1-3093-47e3-b1cb-891ac3a620b2%2F&picture=https%3A%2F%2Fimg.connatix.com%2F73085ee1-3093-47e3-b1cb-891ac3a620b2%2F2_th.jpg&name=2025%20Forbes%20Healthcare%20Summit%20%7C%20Decoding%20Tomorrow%3A%20Epic's%20Blueprint%20For%20Healthcare%20Intelligence&caption=www.forbes.com&description=Judy%20Faulkner%20founded%20Epic%2045%20years%20ago%20in%20the%20basement%20of%20an%20apartment%20house%20with%20%2470%2C000%20in%20start-up%20money%20and%20turned%20it%20into%20a%20multi-billion%20dollar%20business---ultimately%20building%20the%20digital%20foundation%20of%20modern%20medicine.%20We%E2%80%99ll%20speak%20with%20Judy%20about%20her%20illustrious%20career%20and%20her%20vision%20for%20how%20Epic%E2%80%99s%20%E2%80%9Chealthcare%20intelligence%E2%80%9D%20will%20drive%20the%20long-term%20direction%20of%20digital%20patient%20care.%0A%0AForbes%20Executive%20Editor%20Luisa%20Kroll%20sits%20down%20with%20Epic%20Founder%20%26%20CEO%20Judy%20Faulkner%20at%20the%202025%20Forbes%20Healthcare%20Summit%20in%20New%20York%20City.) [](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F73085ee1-3093-47e3-b1cb-891ac3a620b2%2F&via=forbes&text=2025%20Forbes%20Healthcare%20Summit%20%7C%20Decoding%20Tomorrow%3A%20Epic's%20Blueprint%20For%20Healthcare%20Intelligence) [](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F73085ee1-3093-47e3-b1cb-891ac3a620b2%2F&title=2025%20Forbes%20Healthcare%20Summit%20%7C%20Decoding%20Tomorrow%3A%20Epic's%20Blueprint%20For%20Healthcare%20Intelligence&summary=Judy%20Faulkner%20founded%20Epic%2045%20years%20ago%20in%20the%20basement%20of%20an%20apartment%20house%20with%20%2470%2C000%20in%20start-up%20money%20and%20turned%20it%20into%20a%20multi-billion%20dollar%20business---ultimately%20building%20the%20digital%20foundation%20of%20modern%20medicine.%20We%E2%80%99ll%20speak%20with%20Judy%20about%20her%20illustrious%20career%20and%20her%20vision%20for%20how%20Epic%E2%80%99s%20%E2%80%9Chealthcare%20intelligence%E2%80%9D%20will%20drive%20the%20long-term%20direction%20of%20digital%20patient%20care.%0A%0AForbes%20Executive%20Editor%20Luisa%20Kroll%20sits%20down%20with%20Epic%20Founder%20%26%20CEO%20Judy%20Faulkner%20at%20the%202025%20Forbes%20Healthcare%20Summit%20in%20New%20York%20City.)

[### 2024 Forbes Healthcare Summit | The Future Of Care Delivery](https://www.forbes.com/video/9186daea-0e0c-457d-9e1a-78ae252e2411/)

As hospitals and health systems move further into the digital age, healthcare delivery is becoming more personalized, efficient and effective. Moira Forbes, ForbesWomen President & Publisher and Forbes EVP, sits down with Epic Founder & CEO Judy Faulkner and NYU Langone Health and Dean CEO Robert I. Grossman, M.D. -- two visionaries who share their insights on the trends shaping the future of care delivery and discuss strategies to produce better outcomes in a rapidly changing environment which includes shifting away from fee-for-service medicine to value-based care that requires healthcare to be delivered in the right place, at the right time and in the right amount.

By [Nicolet Hartmann](https://www.forbes.com/sites/nicolethartmann/) Forbes Staff

[](https://www.facebook.com/dialog/feed?app_id=123694841080850&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F9186daea-0e0c-457d-9e1a-78ae252e2411%2F&picture=https%3A%2F%2Fimageio.forbes.com%2Fi-forbesimg%2Fmedia%2Fvideo%2F2024%2F12%2F06%2F9186daea-0e0c-457d-9e1a-78ae252e2411_thumb.jpg%3Fformat%3Djpg%26width%3D440&name=2024%20Forbes%20Healthcare%20Summit%20%7C%20The%20Future%20Of%20Care%20Delivery&caption=www.forbes.com&description=As%20hospitals%20and%20health%20systems%20move%20further%20into%20the%20digital%20age%2C%20healthcare%20delivery%20is%20becoming%20more%20personalized%2C%20efficient%20and%20effective.%20%20%20Moira%20Forbes%2C%20ForbesWomen%20President%20%26%20Publisher%20and%20Forbes%20EVP%2C%20sits%20down%20with%20Epic%20Founder%20%26%20CEO%20Judy%20Faulkner%20and%20NYU%20Langone%20Health%20and%20Dean%20CEO%20Robert%20I.%20Grossman%2C%20M.D.%20--%20two%20visionaries%20who%20share%20their%20insights%20on%20the%20trends%20shaping%20the%20future%20of%20care%20delivery%20and%20discuss%20strategies%20to%20produce%20better%20outcomes%20in%20a%20rapidly%20changing%20environment%20which%20includes%20shifting%20away%20from%20fee-for-service%20medicine%20to%20value-based%20care%20that%20requires%20healthcare%20to%20be%20delivered%20in%20the%20right%20place%2C%20at%20the%20right%20time%20and%20in%20the%20right%20amount.) [](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F9186daea-0e0c-457d-9e1a-78ae252e2411%2F&via=forbes&text=2024%20Forbes%20Healthcare%20Summit%20%7C%20The%20Future%20Of%20Care%20Delivery) [](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fvideo%2F9186daea-0e0c-457d-9e1a-78ae252e2411%2F&title=2024%20Forbes%20Healthcare%20Summit%20%7C%20The%20Future%20Of%20Care%20Delivery&summary=As%20hospitals%20and%20health%20systems%20move%20further%20into%20the%20digital%20age%2C%20healthcare%20delivery%20is%20becoming%20more%20personalized%2C%20efficient%20and%20effective.%20%20%20Moira%20Forbes%2C%20ForbesWomen%20President%20%26%20Publisher%20and%20Forbes%20EVP%2C%20sits%20down%20with%20Epic%20Founder%20%26%20CEO%20Judy%20Faulkner%20and%20NYU%20Langone%20Health%20and%20Dean%20CEO%20Robert%20I.%20Grossman%2C%20M.D.%20--%20two%20visionaries%20who%20share%20their%20insights%20on%20the%20trends%20shaping%20the%20future%20of%20care%20delivery%20and%20discuss%20strategies%20to%20produce%20better%20outcomes%20in%20a%20rapidly%20changing%20environment%20which%20includes%20shifting%20away%20from%20fee-for-service%20medicine%20to%20value-based%20care%20that%20requires%20healthcare%20to%20be%20delivered%20in%20the%20right%20place%2C%20at%20the%20right%20time%20and%20in%20the%20right%20amount.)

[### Judy Faulkner Made $7.7 Billion From Healthcare Software. Here’s Her Unusual Plan To Give It Away.](https://www.forbes.com/sites/katiejennings/2024/10/19/judy-faulkner-made-77-billion-from-healthcare-software-heres-her-unusual-plan-to-give-it-away/)

Led by her youngest daughter Shana Dall’Osto, the Epic founder and CEO’s family foundation Roots & Wings will soon be granting around $100 million to hundreds of nonprofits each year.

By [Katie Jennings](https://www.forbes.com/sites/katiejennings/) Former Staff

[](https://www.facebook.com/dialog/feed?app_id=123694841080850&link=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fsites%2Fkatiejennings%2F2024%2F10%2F19%2Fjudy-faulkner-made-77-billion-from-healthcare-software-heres-her-unusual-plan-to-give-it-away%2F&picture=https%3A%2F%2Fimageio.forbes.com%2Fspecials-images%2Fimageserve%2F6719631c5a41de1f2f546d41%2F0x0.jpg%3Fformat%3Djpg%26crop%3D1920%2C1080%2Cx0%2Cy0%2Csafe%26width%3D440&name=Judy%20Faulkner%20Made%20%247.7%20Billion%20From%20Healthcare%20Software.%20Here%E2%80%99s%20Her%20Unusual%20Plan%20To%20Give%20It%20Away.&caption=www.forbes.com&description=Led%20by%20her%20youngest%20daughter%20Shana%20Dall%E2%80%99Osto%2C%20the%20Epic%20founder%20and%20CEO%E2%80%99s%20family%20foundation%20Roots%20%26%20Wings%20will%20soon%20be%20granting%20around%20%24100%20million%20to%20hundreds%20of%20nonprofits%20each%20year.%20) [](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fsites%2Fkatiejennings%2F2024%2F10%2F19%2Fjudy-faulkner-made-77-billion-from-healthcare-software-heres-her-unusual-plan-to-give-it-away%2F&via=forbes&text=Judy%20Faulkner%20Made%20%247.7%20Billion%20From%20Healthcare%20Software.%20Here%E2%80%99s%20Her%20Unusual%20Plan%20To%20Give%20It%20Away.) [](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.forbes.com%2Fsites%2Fkatiejennings%2F2024%2F10%2F19%2Fjudy-faulkner-made-77-billion-from-healthcare-software-heres-her-unusual-plan-to-give-it-away%2F&title=Judy%20Faulkner%20Made%20%247.7%20Billion%20From%20Healthcare%20Software.%20Here%E2%80%99s%20Her%20Unusual%20Plan%20To%20Give%20It%20Away.&summary=Led%20by%20her%20youngest%20daughter%20Shana%20Dall%E2%80%99Osto%2C%20the%20Epic%20founder%20and%20CEO%E2%80%99s%20family%20foundation%20Roots%20%26%20Wings%20will%20soon%20be%20granting%20around%20%24100%20million%20to%20hundreds%20of%20nonprofits%20each%20year.%20)

[### InnovationRx: This AI Startup Helps Patients Fight Insurance Denials](https://www.forbes.com/sites/innovationrx/2024/10/02/innovationrx-this-ai-startup-helps-patients-fight-insurance-denials/)

Plus: Here’s how Epic founder and CEO Judy Faulkner will keep her medical records company private, independent and employee-owned forever.
